mentions.note: Part of 'Big Five Travel' theme; terrific trades ahead of earnings.
Travel bull market lives; fundamentally unaffected by enterprise software disruption thesis.
Solid strength in travel; consumer still booking despite uncertainty.
Up stock—buy every dip with conviction; Cramer willing to pull the trigger every time it declines; best hotel company in the space.
Long-term winner despite up 70% YTD and down from 2021 highs; prefer over Marriott Vacations (VAC); much better longer-term growth.
Cramer's preferred Marriott: a long-term winner with much better long-term growth than the timeshare business.
